name: rogue-lint
description: Whole-project dead code analysis for JavaScript and TypeScript with agent-friendly output.

scripts.self: npm run build && node dist/cli.js . --mode library
scripts.self:json: npm run build && node dist/cli.js . --mode library --json
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run build && npm test
scripts.prep: npm run check && node dist/cli.js . --mode library && npm run pack:check

author: hadetan
